calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-03-2006 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Vicki Gross.
Petitioner: Zoila Esmeralda Funes, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Carmen Esmeralda Quintanillo, and with Spanish Interpreter: Jose B,
Jose Quintanillo, the Minor's Father is also present and opposed the name change of the minor.
Parties and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
after hearing the testimony of the Petitioner and objections to the proposed change of name that were made at the hearing, the Petition is DENIED without prejudice.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-19-2006 Reset To Oct-03-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Nici Ronich.
Petitioner: Zoila Esmeralda Funes, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Carmen Esmeralda Quintanilla.
Matter is ordered for continuance to Oct. 3, 2006, for Petitioner to bring own Spanish Interpreter to the hearing, and lacks the Minor's Father consent or proof of service on notice, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to Oct. 3, 2006 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218. Republication of OSC is waived.
Referral Form to ACCESS Center was giving to the Petitioner.
No objections to the proposed change of name of the Minor were made at the hearing.
